variant_description: Only 3 of 4 emission fields required: omits Work/Machine Center Emissions
Split from 3 to 2: second adjustment uses 1 lot (440) instead of 2 lots (220+220)
Order Tracking Policy set to None: no automatic tracking split, tests rounding fix without order tracking
Both success and failed transactions create journal lines; remove Status filter
Date condition: only set Ending Date when Starting Date is not WORKDATE
Delete flag condition: do not set Ending Date when Delete Exchanged Component is selected
New version condition: do not set Ending Date when Create New Version is selected
Headline should only be hidden for the current user, without affecting other users' headline visibility
Headline should not trigger a database modify if it is already hidden (idempotency)
If the headline record does not exist for the user, it should be created as hidden instead of doing nothing (creation fallback)
VAT Settlement should bypass the Journal Template Name mandatory check only when Preview mode is used (Post = false)
VAT Settlement should bypass the check only when called from the VAT Settlement report (not general posting)
VAT Settlement should bypass the check only for Customer entries, not Vendor entries
Require incoming document on last journal line instead of any line
Require all journal lines reference the same Incoming Document Entry No.
Only update Customer Ledger Entry when new Your Reference is non-empty
Your Reference must not exceed 20 characters
Only update Customer Ledger Entry when entry is not on hold
Only Shpfy Order Id must be cleared when copying; other Shopify fields remain unchanged
Shpfy Order Id should be cleared only for posted invoices copied into new invoices (not other document types)
The reminder email should use the customer email only if the contact email is empty (not when contact is missing)
The reminder email must be set via an event subscriber during reminder creation, not via direct table logic
Custom Amount must be positive only when Emission Factor CO2 is positive; otherwise preserve original sign
Only G/L accounts with Direct Posting enabled should be considered when collecting amounts; non-Direct Posting accounts are excluded
Only issued reminders for customers with a non-empty Language Code should be logged in email related records
Email logging must occur only when triggered via an event subscriber, not via direct table logic
Email should be logged only if the reminder is actually sent, not saved as draft
Vendor Name should be populated only when updated through a validation trigger event, not via passive UI binding
Vendor Name should be populated only when Account Type is Vendor AND Document Type is Invoice
The adjustment process should skip execution only when triggered via VAT entry iteration events and no VAT entries exist
The adjustment process should skip only when no VAT entries exist and VAT Exchange Rate Adjustment is enabled
The service header status should update only when the repair status validation is triggered via OnValidate event
The service header status should update only when the new line has a Pending repair status
The service header status should update only after the service item line is committed (Modify)
The service header status should update only for Service Orders, not for other service document types
The print operation should succeed only when the transaction is committed regardless of GUI mode
The print operation should only be allowed from the Service Order List page, not from the Card page
Non-deductible VAT should only be added to Job Journal Line when the Job currency code is defined (non-empty)
Non-deductible VAT should only be applied when the Job Journal Line has a valid non-zero quantity
The relation should only be validated when the contact is of type Company
Unit Cost and Unit Price must be restored only when posting is triggered through the standard posting action
Unit Cost and Unit Price should only be restored when Quantity is greater than zero
Unit Cost and Unit Price should only be restored if the Resource still exists
Customer change must be triggered via field validation instead of direct function call
System-Created Entry should only be set to false when planning line Type is Item
System-Created Entry should be set to false only when Copy Quantity is enabled
System-Created Entry should be set to false only when source line type is Both Budget and Billable
